primaryLaw: Every change must strengthen at least one of: coherence, trust, safety, discoverability, retention, journey-completion, emotional-continuity, operational-compression.

A.name: Authority Systems
A.contract: Admin auth + audit trail + two-person rule for destructive ops

B.name: Behavioral Continuity
B.contract: Lumi memory transparency; consent-gated cross-session recall

C.name: Content Intelligence
C.contract: Tagged library + evidence base + curated rails

D.name: Discoverability Engine
D.contract: Single IA spine; semantic search; sitemap parity

E.name: Experience Depth
E.contract: Guided journeys with named beginnings, middles, ends

F.name: Feature Priority Matrix
F.contract: New work must map to a Next Major Leap line

G.name: Growth Systems
G.contract: Lifecycle email + word-of-mouth; no growth hacks

J.name: Journey Engineering
J.contract: Each healing entry has a defined exit + crisis-aware fallback

L.name: Legal + Trust Maturity
L.contract: Privacy + terms + disclaimer uniformity; one source per surface

N.name: Navigation Systems
N.contract: One header, one footer, one mobile bar; derived from registry

P.name: Performance
P.contract: Bundle + LCP/INP/CLS + AI latency budgets, CI-enforced

Q.name: Quality Gates
Q.contract: build, health, routes, a11y, bundle, duplication, privacy, rollback

R.name: Retention
R.contract: Calm return; 'still with you' cadence; no shame patterns

S.name: Search
S.contract: Semantic + scoped; respects domain (healing vs admin)

T.name: Trust + Safety
T.contract: Crisis interlock, prompt-injection defenses, immutable audit log

U.name: UX Maturity
U.contract: Four named states per async component; reduced-motion verified

X.name: Experience Differentiation
X.contract: Calm-by-default; voice spec applied to every surface

Y.name: Yield Systems
Y.contract: Conversion behind a non-coercive paywall; BUSINESS-domain only

Z.name: Zero-Fragmentation Architecture
Z.contract: One registry of routes, one of components, one of content

qualityGates.expect: any new PII surface integrates with /account/data
change revertible by one git revert

changeIntakeContract: Which Next Major Leap line does this strengthen?
What is the smallest valid engine (CSS / patch / component / page / service)?
What evidence (audit, scan, probe) opens the phase?
What evidence (screenshot, build hash, probe) closes the phase?
What rollback is one revert away?
